mapper.insert: MERGE INTO PRODUCT p USING ( SELECT TRIM(#{itemSeq}) AS PRODUCT_CODE, NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(#{itemName}), 1, 150), 'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_NAME, SUBSTR(TRIM(#{entpName}), 1, 100) AS MAKER_NAME, NVL(TRIM(#{spcltyPblc}), 'N') AS IS_PRESCRIPTION FROM DUAL WHERE TRIM(#{itemSeq}) IS NOT NULL ) src ON (p.PRODUCT_CODE = src.PRODUCT_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.PRODUCT_NAME = src.PRODUCT_NAME, p.MAKER_NAME = src.MAKER_NAME, p.IS_PRESCRIPTION = src.IS_PRESCRIPTION, p.STATUS = 'ACTIVE', p.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NVL(p.PRODUCT_NAME, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.PRODUCT_NAME, CHR(0)) OR NVL(p.MAKER_NAME, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.MAKER_NAME, CHR(0)) OR NVL(p.IS_PRESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.IS_PRESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) OR NVL(p.STATUS, CHR(0)) <> 'ACTIVE' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, MAKER_NAME, UNIT, STANDARD_PURCHASE_PRICE, STANDARD_SALES_PRICE, IS_PRESCRIPTION, STORAGE_TYPE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(PRODUCT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM PRODUCT), src.PRODUCT_CODE, src.PRODUCT_NAME, src.MAKER_NAME, 'EA', 0, 0, src.IS_PRESCRIPTION, 'ROOM', 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO PRODUCT_SPEC ps USING ( SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, 'BASIC_INFO' AS SPEC_NAME, SUBSTR( 'type=' || NVL(TRIM(#{prductType}), '') || ', permitNo=' || NVL(TRIM(#{prductPrmisnNo}), '') || ', ediCode=' || NVL(TRIM(#{ediCode}), ''), 1, 300 ) AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT p WHERE p.PRODUCT_CODE = TRIM(#{itemSeq}) ) src ON (ps.PRODUCT_ID = src.PRODUCT_ID AND ps.SPEC_NAME = src.SPEC_NAME) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ps.DESCRIPTION = src.DESCRIPTION, ps.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE NVL(ps.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) OR NVL(ps.USE_YN, CHR(0)) <> 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SPEC_ID, PRODUCT_ID, SPEC_NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(SPEC_ID), 0) + 1 FROM PRODUCT_SPEC), src.PRODUCT_ID, src.SPEC_NAME, src.DESCRIPTION, 'Y', SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO PRODUCT p USING ( SELECT TRIM(#{itemSeq}) AS PRODUCT_CODE, NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(#{packUnit}), 1, 20), 'EA') AS UNIT, NVL(TRIM(#{storageType}), 'ROOM') AS STORAGE_TYPE FROM DUAL WHERE TRIM(#{itemSeq}) IS NOT NULL ) src ON (p.PRODUCT_CODE = src.PRODUCT_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.UNIT = src.UNIT, p.STORAGE_TYPE = src.STORAGE_TYPE, p.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NVL(p.UNIT, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.UNIT, CHR(0)) OR NVL(p.STORAGE_TYPE, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.STORAGE_TYPE, CHR(0))

MERGE INTO PRODUCT_SPEC ps USING ( SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, 'DETAIL_INFO' AS SPEC_NAME, SUBSTR( 'storageMethod=' || NVL(TRIM(#{storageMethod}), '') || ', validTerm=' || NVL(TRIM(#{validTerm}), '') || ', packUnit=' || NVL(TRIM(#{packUnit}), ''), 1, 300 ) AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT p WHERE p.PRODUCT_CODE = TRIM(#{itemSeq}) ) src ON (ps.PRODUCT_ID = src.PRODUCT_ID AND ps.SPEC_NAME = src.SPEC_NAME) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ps.DESCRIPTION = src.DESCRIPTION, ps.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE NVL(ps.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) OR NVL(ps.USE_YN, CHR(0)) <> 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SPEC_ID, PRODUCT_ID, SPEC_NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(SPEC_ID), 0) + 1 FROM PRODUCT_SPEC), src.PRODUCT_ID, src.SPEC_NAME, src.DESCRIPTION, 'Y', SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO PRODUCT_SPEC ps USING ( SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, SUBSTR( 'INGREDIENT_' || NVL(TRIM(#{itemIngrCnt}), NVL(TRIM(#{itemIngrName}), 'UNKNOWN')), 1, 100 ) AS SPEC_NAME, SUBSTR( 'name=' || NVL(TRIM(#{itemIngrName}), '') || ', count=' || NVL(TRIM(#{itemIngrCnt}), '') || ', main=' || NVL(TRIM(#{mainItemIngr}), '') || ', amount=' || NVL(TRIM(#{totalAmount}), '') || ', unit=' || NVL(TRIM(#{ingredientUnit}), ''), 1, 300 ) AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT p WHERE p.PRODUCT_CODE = TRIM(#{itemSeq}) ) src ON (ps.PRODUCT_ID = src.PRODUCT_ID AND ps.SPEC_NAME = src.SPEC_NAME) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ps.DESCRIPTION = src.DESCRIPTION, ps.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE NVL(ps.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) <> NVL(src.DESCRIPTION, CHR(0)) OR NVL(ps.USE_YN, CHR(0)) <> 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SPEC_ID, PRODUCT_ID, SPEC_NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(SPEC_ID), 0) + 1 FROM PRODUCT_SPEC), src.PRODUCT_ID, src.SPEC_NAME, src.DESCRIPTION, 'Y', SYSDATE )
